nasb.text: After them the Tekoites repaired another section in front of the great projecting tower and as far as the wall of Ophel.

esv.text: After him the Tekoites repaired another section opposite the great projecting tower as far as the wall of Ophel.

cnv.text: 再下一段，就是由提哥亞人修築的另一段，從那突出來的大城樓對面，直到俄斐勒的城牆。

ccb.text: 再下一段由提哥亚人修筑，他们从凸出来的大城楼对面修到俄斐勒的城墙。
